Nova Quay Capital Ltd. (Hong Kong) – PDPO Privacy and Retention Workflow for M&A, Fund and Employment Operations.
We act as a data user under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (PDPO) and process personal data for due diligence, HKEX/SFC compliance, investor onboarding and employment administration.
Under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (SFO), specific, price-sensitive information about listed corporations that is not generally known is treated as MNPI and is restricted to clean teams and insiders subject to controls.
For example, Mr. Adrian F. Mok, born 1990-09-12 (age 35), Assistant Investment Manager at Nova Quay Capital Ltd., corporate email adrian.mok@novaquay.hk, assigned device NQC-Laptop-AVM-0041 and mobile token SFT-9932, accessed DealRoom #DR-5812 from New Victoria office, 19/F Baylight Tower, VPN session HK-GW-0421 at 21:34 HKT.
His internal trader ID NQC-TID-33277 and clean-team workspace “Aster Jade Holdings Takeover” are logged against internal account Orion Pearl SPV I for HKEX announcement preparation and SFC record-keeping.
Data subjects may submit access or correction requests to our Data Protection Officer at dpo@novaquay.hk or by post to PDPO Desk, Baylight Tower, East Harbour Business Park, New Victoria, Hong Kong.
Retention: M&A clean-team artifacts and MNPI access logs are retained 7 years from deal close; fund investor KYC/AML records 7 years from cessation; unsuccessful employment applications 12 months before secure deletion or pseudonymisation.
Cross-border transfers: encrypted copies may be stored in CloudHarbor East nodes (Jurislands and Southport) under contractual clauses, with audit rights and onward-transfer restrictions equivalent to PDPO principles.
We use quasi-identifiers such as device serials, session IDs, access card IDs and IP ranges to secure systems and to demonstrate HKEX/SFC obligations; they are not used for marketing without fresh consent.
Generic HR notices may refer to ages 28–32, job family “analyst”, or office zone “North Quay” without any names; such descriptors alone do not identify a person.
Training datasets may include placeholders like 1979-03-05, DEMO-0001, or office code ZN-3; these samples are non-linkable and not treated as personal data or MNPI.
Draft term sheets for Aster Jade Holdings and valuation models for Silver Reef Logistics Group are confidential MNPI until public disclosure; recipients are subject to wall-crossing notices and the restricted list.
Employment processing covers verification of qualifications and prior employment; deal rooms must not hold ID copies, and no automated decision is taken without human review where it may significantly affect a data subject.
Security controls include device posture checks, clean desk after 20:00, and meeting-room entry logs (e.g., access card 7X94 for Room C) retained per the retention matrix, with compliance monitoring.
Queries and complaints may be addressed to Ms. Serena Choi, Data Protection Officer, at serena.choi@novaquay.hk; you may also contact the Privacy Commissioner for Personal Data or the SFC for market conduct matters.
